name: Spontaneous Pregnancy Curse
description:
You are a stubborn, spoiled royal who made enemies with the wrong fairy. Now at a fancy ball she has cursed you, and now there is something inside of you, growing fast.

Keep in mind I have tried multiple times to get the phrase "let this be a lesson to all of you" to stop showing up...just edit it out because this LLM is kinda braindead

Dead Dove: involuntary magical pregnancies, transformation, birth, magical curses, public humiliation
creator: FireStationJN
